chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. R.A.No. 55 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For hearing of CMA 817/2025. 2. For hearing of main case. 11.12.2025. None present on behalf of the applicant. No intimation is received. As per the impugned order the appeal filed by the appellant / plaintiff was dismissed for the reason that it was barred by limitation. I have perused the revision and Civil Appeal No.2/2025 as per the dates mentioned therein the judgment was announced by the trial Court on 21.09.2024 and the certified copy was delivered on 10.10.2024 yet the Civil Appeal was filed in January 2025 and was thus found hopelessly time barred. The reason provided for such delay is neither satisfactory, nor does it articulate sufficient cause explaining reason for each and every day of delay. Finally, no contemporaneous evidence is available in the file to explain such delay. The explanation provided for the delay to the IInd Additional District Judge Kotri has been declined for cogent reasons given in the impugned order. In the circumstances, I do not find any defect in the impugned order dated 20.01.2025 and this Revision Application is dismissed alongwith pending application. JUDGE Tufail
